title: Monday and Mavenlink Integration
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
Is there a way to integrate Monday and Mavenlink? Can someone please let me know how?> Thank you!

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Is there a way to integrate Monday and Mavenlink? Can someone please let me know how?> Thank you!

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TJ_S

Mavenlink is available through Integromat: https://www.integromat.com/en/integrations/mavenlink

If you haven’t used Integromat yet, its free to try and I can offer some help in the setup, but I’ve never used Mavenlink before.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
